rules.description:
(hyper + a): Open application

• `b` → open app: Google Chrome
• `m` → open app: Spotify
• `c` → open app: Slack
• `t` → open app: Terminal
• `z` → open app: Zoom

set_notification_message.text:
(hyper + a): Open application

• `b` → open app: Google Chrome
• `m` → open app: Spotify
• `c` → open app: Slack
• `t` → open app: Terminal
• `z` → open app: Zoom

rules.description:
(hyper + k): Karabiner development helpers

• `d` → deeplink: extensions/raycast/raycast/confetti
• `s` → run script: script-example
• `e` → run script: karabiner-edit-index
• `r` → run script: karabiner-recompile
• `l` → run script: karabiner-logs
• `x` → run script: karabiner-hello-world

set_notification_message.text:
(hyper + k): Karabiner development helpers

• `d` → deeplink: extensions/raycast/raycast/confetti
• `s` → run script: script-example
• `e` → run script: karabiner-edit-index
• `r` → run script: karabiner-recompile
• `l` → run script: karabiner-logs
• `x` → run script: karabiner-hello-world

to.shell_command:
{
  export REPO_ROOT="$HOME/.config/karabiner/karabiner.ts"
  export REPO_LIB="${REPO_ROOT}/src/scripts/lib"
  export PATH="/Users/arisweedler/h/node/env-22.14.0/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:${PATH}"
  set -x
  date
  cd "${REPO_ROOT:?}"
  echo "Invoking /Users/arisweedler/.config/karabiner/karabiner.ts/src/scripts/bin/script-example"
  /Users/arisweedler/.config/karabiner/karabiner.ts/src/scripts/bin/script-example
} &> "/tmp/karabiner.script-example.txt"

rules.description:
(hyper + w): Window management

• `⌫` → restore
• `⏎` → almost-maximize
• `h` → left-half
• `l` → right-half
• `q` → left-third
• `w` → center-third
• `e` → right-third
• `u` → top-left-quarter
• `i` → top-right-quarter
• `j` → bottom-left-quarter
• `k` → bottom-right-quarter
• `c` → center
• `r` → reasonable-size
• `f` → toggle-fullscreen
• `-` → make-smaller
• `=` → make-larger
• `,` → previous-display
• `.` → next-display
• `[` → previous-desktop
• `]` → next-desktop

set_notification_message.text:
(hyper + w): Window management

• `⌫` → restore
• `⏎` → almost-maximize
• `h` → left-half
• `l` → right-half
• `q` → left-third
• `w` → center-third
• `e` → right-third
• `u` → top-left-quarter
• `i` → top-right-quarter
• `j` → bottom-left-quarter
• `k` → bottom-right-quarter
• `c` → center
• `r` → reasonable-size
• `f` → toggle-fullscreen
• `-` → make-smaller
• `=` → make-larger
• `,` → previous-display
• `.` → next-display
• `[` → previous-desktop
• `]` → next-desktop

rules.description:
(hyper + g): Google Drive document macros

• `s` → run script: osascript-google-drive-codeblock-shell
• `j` → run script: osascript-google-drive-codeblock-javascript
